description: Initializes the multi-section line member fetching routine ‘NXTMSL’ for retrieving lines that are sections of the specified multi-section line from IBUS to JBUS. This API routine was first introduced in release 28.0.0. ierr = inimsl(ibus, jbus, ickt)

error_codes.description: Bus not found; NXTMSL may not be used.
& not the first character of ‘ICKT’; NXTMSL may not be used.
Multi-section line not found; NXTMSL may not be used.
